name: Apple & Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dessert apples, peeled and cored, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the base and sides of a loaf pan with parchment paper.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a bowl, mix together the flour and margarine until well combined.
4. Add cinnamon, walnuts, raisins, grated apples, grated carrots, and orange peel to the mixture.
5. Beat in the eggs and orange juice until thoroughly combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
7. Bake for about 1 ¼ hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake is firm to touch.
8. Turn the cake out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
